# LeapSwap — full LLM context

> White-label Swap / Bridge Widget SDK (LiFi-based). Same-chain data is injectable; cross-chain adapters live in the widget/sdk.

This file is the expanded GEO companion to [`llms.txt`](./llms.txt). Prefer `llms.txt` first; use this when you need integration rules without crawling the whole monorepo.

## What LeapSwap is

- Embeddable React Widget (`@leapswap/widget`) for Swap and Bridge UIs
- White-label: theme, `poweredBy`, `hiddenUI`, wallet collaboration with outer wagmi / Solana / Bigmi providers
- Same-chain quotes: host must inject `swapDataProvider` + `chainsProvider`
- Cross-chain: `@leapswap/widget-sdk` aggregates LiFi, Relay, DeBridge, etc.

## Hard architecture rule

| Layer | May know vendor APIs? | Role |
|-------|----------------------|------|
| `@leapswap/widget` / `widget-sdk` | No | Consume generic fields only |
| `@leapswap/business-integrator` | OpenOcean only | Map OO → generic contract |
| `examples/kyberswap/src/integrator` | KyberSwap (+ DefiLlama for USD) | Prove any aggregator can plug in without changing Widget |
| Host app integrator | Yes | Adapt your DEX / aggregator |

Never leak vendor names like `gasUsd`, `approveContract`, `dexId`, `routeSummary` into Widget types. Adapt them in the integrator to `estimatedGas`, `approvalAddress`, `outAmount`, `priceUSD`, etc.

## Required injection

```ts
import { LeapSwapWidget } from '@leapswap/widget'

<LeapSwapWidget
  integrator="your-app-id"
  swapDataProvider={swapDataProvider}
  chainsProvider={chainsProvider}
/>
```

`SwapDataProvider` must implement at least: `getQuote`, `getSwapQuote`, `getTokenList`, `getGasPrice`, `getTokenInfo`, `getTokensPrice`, `getRpcUrl`.

Widget UI notes:
- Est. Gas Fee USD ≈ `estimatedGas × gasPrice × nativeToken.priceUSD`
- Price impact uses token `priceUSD` (from list or `getTokensPrice`)
- If your vendor has no token prices (e.g. Kyber Setting API), fill `priceUSD` in the integrator (Kyber example uses DefiLlama)

## Packages to publish (planned)

- `@leapswap/widget`
- `@leapswap/widget-sdk`
- `@leapswap/wallet-management`
- `@leapswap/widget-types`
- `@leapswap/business-integrator` (optional OpenOcean reference)

## Examples

| Example | Port | Integrator |
|---------|------|------------|
| `examples/openocean` | 3000 (`pnpm dev`) | `@leapswap/business-integrator` + Custom stub |
| `examples/kyberswap` | 3001 (`pnpm dev:kyberswap`) | Local Kyber Aggregator v1 adapter |

Kyber browser demo proxies CORS via Vite: `/kyber-setting`, `/kyber-aggregator`, `/llama-prices`.

## Dev

```bash
pnpm install   # Node >= 20, pnpm 10
pnpm dev
pnpm dev:kyberswap
pnpm build     # before publish
```
